task_completion.description: At least 3 new folders were created for distinct categories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email client's folder pane, there should be at least 3 new custom folders visible in addition to the pre-existing 'Security-Discussion' and 'Hardware-Issues' folders.

task_completion.description: The inbox has been cleared to 5 or fewer remaining emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the Inbox is selected in the email client, the message list should display 5 or fewer emails, indicating the rest have been moved.

task_completion.description: An email is composed to the correct recipient with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window (or sent email) shows the 'To' field as 'project-director@devteam.com' and the 'Subject' exactly as 'Inbox Organization Complete - Final Status'.

task_completion.description: The email body lists all folders and their email counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email body contains a list of at least 5 folders (including 'Security-Discussion' and 'Hardware-Issues' plus the new ones) and explicitly states the number of emails contained in each.

task_completion.description: The email body includes a one-sentence description for each folder's content type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Next to or below each folder listed in the email body, there is a brief description (approximately one sentence) explaining the type of content or category of the emails in that folder.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show an actual email client application (like Thunderbird or Evolution) being used to organize folders and compose the email, rather than a terminal or plain text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually organized the emails in the client, rather than just writing the status email.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folder pane in the email client should reflect the newly created folders, and the inbox message list should actually be reduced, proving the emails were moved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pre-existing folders are 'Security-Discussion' and 'Hardware-Issues'. The agent must create a minimum of 3 new folders (totaling at least 5). The inbox must have 5 or fewer emails remaining. The status email must be addressed to 'project-director@devteam.com' with the exact subject 'Inbox Organization Complete - Final Status'.
